# PHIL.075 ? Postmodernism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** contemporary
**Subcategory:** postmodernism
**Domain:** CONTEMPORARY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Skepticism of grand narratives; perspectivism; fragmentation; irony; anti-essentialism; local knowledge

## Application
Question meta-narratives; multiple perspectives; local and contextual knowledge; ironic stance; anti-essentialist approach

## Key Values
- Skepticism of totality
- Perspectivism
- Local knowledge
- Anti-essentialism

## Tags
philosophy, contemporary, postmodernism
